title: Ordering the Y and X axis
excerpt: It would be really helpful to be able to order the X and Y axis not by the volume in the data but by our own choice.  We have information displaying columns by year but we can only order ascending or descending based on …

posts.author: GeorginaMonet1 (Georgina Monet)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be really helpful to be able to order the X and Y axis not by the volume in the data but by our own choice. We have information displaying columns by year but we can only order ascending or descending based on the data in the chart and not by the actual years which is what we would want, so the years were in order.
